description:
India's Chenab Bridge pushed the limits of modern construction.
Try your first Odoo app for free today 👉 https://bit.ly/498GF8e

🔥 Pre-order Fred's book MEGA BUILDS now 👉 https://bit.ly/3Y63G6X

Full story here - https://www.theb1m.com/video/india-built-the-worlds-most-remote-bridge

Additional footage and images: Trimble, Narendra Modi, Afcons, Lalit Kumar Rawal, The Print, Megha Engineering and Infrastructures Ltd, The Indian Express, North Geographic, Gyan Tokri, Jean-Yves FOUCHECOURT.

00:00 Intro
01:05 Nightmarish conditions
02:40 Why build the bridge
03:36 Building Chenab Bridge
10:15 Seismic challenges
11:10 Battling the sun
12:04 An impressive accomplishment

For more by The B1M subscribe now 👉 https://bit.ly/the-b1m

We're raising awareness of construction's mental health crisis through our Get Construction Talking initiative. There’s a video series on our channel and you can find support or donate at - https://www.getconstructiontalking.org/

Follow Get Construction Talking
